name: Global Signal Inc.
description: Global Signal Inc. was a leading owner, operator, and lessor of wireless communications towers and other transmission sites in the United States. Structured as a real estate investment trust (REIT), the company leased antenna space on its multi-tenant towers to a diverse range of wireless service providers, including major cellular, PCS, and specialized mobile radio operators. In 2007, Global Signal was acquired by Crown Castle International Corp., significantly expanding Crown Castle's wireless infrastructure portfolio.
